meta.purpose: Canonical manifest of Figma-sourced editor assets: device-mockup frames (drop-image-into-screen) and recolorable pictograms. ONE source of truth, imported by app/src/data/figmaAssets.ts — do not duplicate.
meta.figmaSource: Device Mockups · drop image into screen (336:2) + pictogram/* components (~86:4–94:29)
meta.units: frames: `outer` w/h/radius in px (= SVG viewBox units); `screenRect` and `notch` x/y/w/h are % of the outer box (radius in px). icons: own viewBox; `body` is inline SVG markup with ink recolored to currentColor.
meta.status: All 16 device frames + the document pictogram are wired. Remaining pictograms land alongside (Phase 4).
